programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: (PG) When Kramer is hired as a stand-in on a soap opera, he befriends a "little person." But his advice on how to look taller doesn't sit well with the midget's other friends.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian navigates everyday life in New York with his eccentric group of friends, dealing with trivial yet absurd situations. Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life. Through ironic twists and self-centered decisions, their actions often lead to humorous and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Seinfield: Episode
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian navigates everyday life in New York with his eccentric group of friends, dealing with trivial yet absurd situations. Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life. Through ironic twists and self-centered decisions, their actions often lead to humorous and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: (PG) Kramer's moneymaking scheme to sell vintage raincoats designed by Jerry's dad backfires when Morty has to depend on his Florida neighbour to get the goods to New York.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian navigates everyday life in New York with his eccentric group of friends, dealing with trivial yet absurd situations. Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life. Through ironic twists and self-centered decisions, their actions often lead to humorous and unexpected consequences.

programme.desc: A stand-up comedian navigates everyday life in New York with his eccentric group of friends, dealing with trivial yet absurd situations. Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life. Through ironic twists and self-centered decisions, their actions often lead to humorous and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Seinfield: Episode

Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life.
